name: pr-review-loop
description: Drive a PR through alternating review and remediation passes until an outsider review returns 0 Blockers, then run a close-out sub-flow that resolves Important findings, folds easy Suggestions, files issues for the rest, and posts one consolidated PR comment. On code-touching PRs it applies a code-quality rubric: structural regressions hard-block, missed simplifications follow a backoff schedule (Blocker, then Important, then a follow-up issue).
